blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw (survey data), staging, and tgt (analysis) libraries, %LET wave configuration (total_waves=4, wave dates), and OPTIONS

Parameterized %MACRO process_wave(wave_num=, wave_date=) — validates dataset accessibility via %IF, extracts wave respondents via DATA step with composite satisfaction score, engagement classification, and completion rate; runs PROC MEANS for wave-level descriptive statistics with OUTPUT dataset
Driver loop macro %macro run_all_waves wrapping %DO w=1 %TO &total_waves — iterates over all 4 configured survey waves and invokes %process_wave with resolved wave parameters
Invocation of %run_all_waves to execute wave processing for all 4 survey waves
Open-code %IF/%ELSE conditional block: checks &syserr for wave processing errors and warns that longitudinal panel may be incomplete

PROC SQL building longitudinal panel via FULL JOINs across staging.wave_1 through staging.wave_4 on respondent_id, extracting per-wave satisfaction scores, engagement labels, and participation flags into staging.longitudinal_panel

DATA step computing longitudinal change metrics from staging.longitudinal_panel: waves_participated count, overall_change between wave 1 and wave 4, trajectory classification (IMPROVING/DECLINING/STABLE/INSUFFICIENT), and attrition risk flag
PROC FREQ reporting trajectory distribution and trajectory-by-waves_participated cross-tabulation from tgt.wave_changes
Title reset, LIBNAME CLEAR for raw and staging libraries, and longitudinal analysis completion log message
